						<div class="entry-summary">
				<p>JMPD Pointsmen/Patrollers 2025, Grade 10: The Johannesburg Metropolitan Police Department (JMPD) is looking for motivated and observant Pointsmen/Patrollers to join its Regional Operations division. This duty entails active patrolling in&hellip;</p>
			</div><!-- .entry-summary -->
			
			<div class="more-link-wrapper">
				<a href="https://sainfoweb.co.za/2025/01/30/jmpd-pointsmen-patrollers/" class="more-link">Read More</a>
			</div><!-- .more-link-wrapper -->
		</div><!-- .entry-data-wrapper -->

	</div><!-- .post-content-wrapper -->
</article><!-- #post-## -->
